content:
FINAL IVX SENIOR DEVELOPER AUDIT + DEPLOY COMPLETION BLOCK

Work only on:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

Goal:
Prove IVX IA Chat Room can operate as a senior developer end-to-end:
audit, think, fix, deploy, verify, report, and continue independently.

1. SENIOR DEVELOPER CAPABILITY AUDIT

Verify IVX can:
- Read the repo
- Understand frontend/backend/database/deploy config
- Detect bugs
- Edit files
- Run tests
- Fix build errors
- Trigger deployment
- Verify production
- Produce evidence
- Continue next task without stopping

Return:
CODE_ACCESS:
FILE_EDIT_ACCESS:
TEST_ACCESS:
BUILD_ACCESS:
GITHUB_ACCESS:
RENDER_ACCESS:
SUPABASE_ACCESS:
PRODUCTION_VERIFY_ACCESS:
AUTONOMOUS_TASK_ACCESS:
FINAL_CAPABILITY_STATUS:

2. CHAT ROOM END-TO-END AUDIT

Verify live chat room:
- frontend loads
- owner chat screen opens
- message sends
- assistant replies
- user message saves
- assistant message saves
- conversation reloads
- same message IDs persist
- no false “couldn't read response”
- no TypeError network error

Return:
CHAT_FRONTEND:
CHAT_API:
AI_REPLY:
MESSAGE_SAVE:
MESSAGE_LOAD:
MESSAGE_IDS:
ERRORS:
CHAT_STATUS:

3. DEPLOYMENT COMPLETION

Current blocker:
Render deploy ID and Render deployed commit SHA are not surfaced.

Fix this now:
- Add Render deploy-listing integration.
- Fetch latest 10 Render deploys.
- Return deploy ID, status, timestamp, deployed commit SHA.
- Compare latest GitHub SHA vs Render deployed SHA vs /health SHA.
- If mismatch, trigger new deploy.
- Wait for deploy complete.
- Verify /health 200 after deploy.

Return:
LATEST_GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
RENDER_DEPLOY_STATUS:
RENDER_DEPLOYED_SHA:
HEALTH_SHA:
COMMIT_MATCH:
DEPLOYMENT_STATUS:

4. INDEPENDENT SMART BRAIN CHECK

Verify IVX can:
- Decide next task from evidence
- Not invent proof
- Mark unknown as UNVERIFIED
- Retry failed checks
- Escalate only real blockers
- Keep working after one task completes
- Generate next 5-hour plan
- Save evidence history

Return:
EVIDENCE_BASED_REASONING:
NO_FAKE_DEPLOY_CLAIMS:
AUTO_RETRY:
BLOCKER_DETECTION:
NEXT_TASK_SELECTION:
5_HOUR_REPORT_READY:
INDEPENDENCE_STATUS:

5. FINAL OUTPUT ONLY

REPO:
BRANCH:
LATEST_GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_SERVICE:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
RENDER_DEPLOY_STATUS:
RENDER_DEPLOYED_SHA:
HEALTH_STATUS:
HEALTH_SHA:
COMMIT_MATCH:
CHAT_STATUS:
SUPABASE_STATUS:
MONITOR_STATUS:
STREAM_STATUS:
LIVE_WORK_STATUS:
SENIOR_DEVELOPER_STATUS:
INDEPENDENT_WORK_STATUS:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

Allowed FINAL_STATUS:
COMPLETE
BLOCKED
LOCAL ONLY
UNVERIFIED

Do not say COMPLETE unless:
- Render deploy ID exists
- Render deployed SHA exists
- GitHub SHA = Render SHA = /health SHA
- /health returns 200
- chat sends/saves/loads
- Supabase works
- frontend loads
- Monitor/Stream/Live Work show live evidence
